# Skills Index

Workspace skills for Lynx DevTool Chromium upgrade automation.

## Skill List
- `chromium-upgrade-orchestrator`
- `prepare-upstream`
- `apply-lynx-customizations`
- `build-and-package`
- `auto-validate`

## Suggested Usage
1. Start with `chromium-upgrade-orchestrator` for end-to-end execution.
2. Invoke capability skills directly when rerunning only one stage.
